response.justification: The candidate has roughly 15 years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, which technically meets the minimum tenure. However, this is a Director-level IC role centered on AI/cloud platform strategy requiring recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products or platforms, and the resume shows none of that depth — only recent, peripheral exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP generators). The candidate's track record is hands-on individual contribution at the Senior level, not strategic engineering leadership, cloud platform definition, or executive-facing advisory work. The seniority and AI-specialization gap is too large for this Principal/Director role.
strengths: ~15 years of broad engineering experience (web, mobile, embedded, low-latency systems)
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP/agentic developer tooling
Strong engineering-craft culture (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source platform ownership)
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms built at scale
Career trajectory is Senior IC, not Director-level engineering leadership or strategy
No cloud platform strategy, customer/partner advisory, or large-org entrepreneurial experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / AI products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC role
